item.description: Mourners are filling the streets of Tehran as part of a days-long memorial for Iran’s former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the first strikes of the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for Sunday TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Millions Pour Into Tehran to Mourn Late Supreme Leader
media:content.media:description: Mourners are filling the streets of Tehran as part of a days-long memorial for Iran’s former Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed in the first strikes of the war. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for Sunday TODAY.

item.title: Millions Pour Into Tehran to Mourn Late Supreme Leader

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Greg Rosenstein
Monica Alba
item.description: Trump called FIFA days before it reversed the striker’s ban, a source said, while Belgium says is “investigating all potential options” over the decision.

media:content.media:text: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's first goal.
media:content.media:description: Folarin Balogun #20 of the United States celebrates scoring his team's first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 match between USA and Bosnia and Herzegovina at San Francisco Bay Area Stadium on July 01, 2026 in Santa Clara, Calif.

item.title: Trump called FIFA before it reversed U.S. star Folarin Balogun’s suspension, source says

item.description: Los noruegos avanzaron ante la Verdeamarelha con un recital ofensivo de Erling Haaland que puso a vibrar a la afición nórdica que ya espera rival en los cuartos de final en la Copa Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Los vikingos están desbordando pasión al triunfar contra Brasil
media:content.media:description: Los noruegos avanzaron ante la Verdeamarelha con un recital ofensivo de Erling Haaland que puso a vibrar a la afición nórdica que ya espera rival en los cuartos de final en la Copa Mundial.

item.title: Los vikingos están desbordando pasión al triunfar contra Brasil

item.description: Erling Haaland volvió a aparecer para liquidar el partido. El delantero noruego sacó un potente disparo raso desde fuera del área para marcar el 2-0 sobre Brasil y sellar el pase de Noruega a los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡Doblete de Haaland! Noruega sentencia a Brasil y aseguran el pase a cuartos
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland volvió a aparecer para liquidar el partido. El delantero noruego sacó un potente disparo raso desde fuera del área para marcar el 2-0 sobre Brasil y sellar el pase de Noruega a los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: ¡Doblete de Haaland! Noruega sentencia a Brasil y aseguran el pase a cuartos

item.description: Erling Haaland apareció al minuto 80 para romper el empate. El delantero noruego remató de primera tras un centro al área y marcó el 1-0 que acercó a Noruega a los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡Haaland aparece! El androide pone a Noruega cerca de cuartos de final
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland apareció al minuto 80 para romper el empate. El delantero noruego remató de primera tras un centro al área y marcó el 1-0 que acercó a Noruega a los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: ¡Haaland aparece! El androide pone a Noruega cerca de cuartos de final

item.description: Neymar Jr. entra a la cancha en Nueva York/Nueva Jersey para alcanzar a Noruega en octavos de final. Con este partido, la leyenda del fútbol brasileño alcanza la histórica cifra de 130 compromisos vistiendo la camiseta de la ‘Canarinha’.

media:content.media:title: ¡Es momento del ‘10’ brasileño! Neymar Jr. ingresa a la cancha para marcar diferencia ante Noruega
media:content.media:description: Neymar Jr. entra a la cancha en Nueva York/Nueva Jersey para alcanzar a Noruega en octavos de final. Con este partido, la leyenda del fútbol brasileño alcanza la histórica cifra de 130 compromisos vistiendo la camiseta de la ‘Canarinha’.

item.title: ¡Es momento del ‘10’ brasileño! Neymar Jr. ingresa a la cancha para marcar diferencia ante Noruega

item.description: Revive las intervenciones más espectaculares de Vozinha en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Reflejos, vuelos y atajadas decisivas que convirtieron al arquero de Cabo Verde en una de las grandes figuras del torneo.

media:content.media:title: Vozinha, el muro de Cabo Verde: sus mejores atajadas en el Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Revive las intervenciones más espectaculares de Vozinha en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Reflejos, vuelos y atajadas decisivas que convirtieron al arquero de Cabo Verde en una de las grandes figuras del torneo.

item.title: Vozinha, el muro de Cabo Verde: sus mejores atajadas en el Mundial 2026

item.description: Tras una revisión en el VAR, Brasil tuvo la oportunidad de abrir el marcador desde los once pasos. Vinícius Júnior cedió el cobro a Bruno Guimarães, pero el mediocampista desperdició la ocasión al fallar el penal al minuto 12 del partido ante Noruega.

media:content.media:title: ¡Bruno Guimarães falla el penal! Brasil desperdicia la oportunidad del primero
media:content.media:description: Tras una revisión en el VAR, Brasil tuvo la oportunidad de abrir el marcador desde los once pasos. Vinícius Júnior cedió el cobro a Bruno Guimarães, pero el mediocampista desperdició la ocasión al fallar el penal al minuto 12 del partido ante Noruega.

item.title: ¡Bruno Guimarães falla el penal! Brasil desperdicia la oportunidad del primero

item.description: Lo confirmó la leyenda. Cristiano Ronaldo aseguró que está jugando su última Copa del Mundo y que el partido de octavos de final ante España será uno de los más importantes en su carrera.

media:content.media:title: Cristiano Ronaldo: “Disfrutar al máximo… Va a ser mi último Mundial”
media:content.media:description: Lo confirmó la leyenda. Cristiano Ronaldo aseguró que está jugando su última Copa del Mundo y que el partido de octavos de final ante España será uno de los más importantes en su carrera.

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: “Disfrutar al máximo… Va a ser mi último Mundial”

item.description: Los noruegos continúan invictos ante Brasil y vive un gran momento el cuadro nórdico. Haaland, Odegaard y compañía van por la Canarinha y avanzar a cuartos de final.

media:content.media:title: ¡Se enciende el Androide! Haaland calienta motores para el duelo ante Brasil
media:content.media:description: Los noruegos continúan invictos ante Brasil y vive un gran momento el cuadro nórdico. Haaland, Odegaard y compañía van por la Canarinha y avanzar a cuartos de final.

item.title: ¡Se enciende el Androide! Haaland calienta motores para el duelo ante Brasil

item.description: La Selección de Brasil está alistándose para el gran enfrentamiento ante Noruega. Vinícius Junior y compañía buscan el sexto campeonato mundial y reafirmar su autoridad en el fútbol.

media:content.media:title: Vinícius Junior y compañía se preparan para afrontar el reto vikingo en New York
media:content.media:description: La Selección de Brasil está alistándose para el gran enfrentamiento ante Noruega. Vinícius Junior y compañía buscan el sexto campeonato mundial y reafirmar su autoridad en el fútbol.

item.title: Vinícius Junior y compañía se preparan para afrontar el reto vikingo en New York

item.description: Julio César, Roberto Carlos y Cafú analizan por qué el tradicional "jogo bonito" fue desapareciendo del fútbol brasileño. Las leyendas coinciden en que el juego moderno es más táctico, físico y práctico que el de otras épocas.

media:content.media:title: ¿Qué pasó con el "jogo bonito" de Brasil? | Hoy en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Julio César, Roberto Carlos y Cafú analizan por qué el tradicional "jogo bonito" fue desapareciendo del fútbol brasileño. Las leyendas coinciden en que el juego moderno es más táctico, físico y práctico que el de otras épocas.

item.title: ¿Qué pasó con el "jogo bonito" de Brasil? | Hoy en el Mundial

item.dc:creator: Kayla Hayempour
Mark Hodge
Jeremy Mikula
item.description: President Donald Trump on Saturday night delivered an address for America’s 250th birthday on a day roiled by severe weather — from triple-digit temperatures to pouring rain.

media:content.media:text: US-POLITICS-ANNIVERSARY-250
media:content.media:description: An attendee holds up an American flag as he waits for US President Donald Trump to speak during the "Salute to America" Independence Day celebration on the National Mall in Washington, DC, on July 4, 2026. The nation is marking the 250th anniversary of the United States Declaration of Indpendence.

media:content.media:text: Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.
media:content.media:description: Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.

media:content.media:text: Serena Williams.
media:content.media:description: Serena Williams plays last week at Wimbledon in London.

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.description: NBC News is learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding at New York City’s Madison Square Garden from two guests who were there. The bride and groom both wore white and the entertainment was provided by Stevie Nicks and Paul McCartney. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

media:content.media:title: What We Know About Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding
media:content.media:description: NBC News is learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding at New York City’s Madison Square Garden from two guests who were there. The bride and groom both wore white and the entertainment was provided by Stevie Nicks and Paul McCartney. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

item.title: What We Know About Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding

item.description: President Trump concluded the semiquincentennial celebration by reflecting on the nation's history, honoring veterans and pushing his political agenda during his address at the Salute to America event. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports on key points from the president's speech.

media:content.media:title: Trump uses America’s 250 speech to honor military heroes and also push political agendas
media:content.media:description: President Trump concluded the semiquincentennial celebration by reflecting on the nation's history, honoring veterans and pushing his political agenda during his address at the Salute to America event. NBC News’ Ryan Nobles reports on key points from the president's speech.

item.title: Trump uses America’s 250 speech to honor military heroes and also push political agendas

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Fourth of July celebrations across the country were marred by violence that killed at least five people and injured scores in multiple cities.

media:content.media:text: Two NYPD cars drive on the street at night
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

media:content.media:text: 8 wounded in mass shooting on July 4th holiday in New York's Coney Island
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A car is seen on fire while parked on the street
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

item.title: At least five killed in shootings and explosions that leave dozens wounded across the U.S.

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Christine Rapp
item.description: At least 18 record highs were set on July Fourth as celebrations kicked off in mid-Atlantic cities, including Washington and Baltimore.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: A young visitor shields themself from the sun in during July 4th celebrations in Washington, D.C. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: Visitors grab bottles of cold water at the Great American State Fair on the National Mall on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Dust blowing into the air through a crowd of people on the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: Visitors shield themselves from dust blown into the air by high winds from a passing storm during July Fourth celebrations on the Mall on Saturday.

item.title: 25 dead in ongoing heat wave as storms bring flood and wind threats to the East Coast

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Jay Blackman
item.description: The aircraft landed safely and taxied to the gate, the airline said, adding that the incident is under review.

media:content.media:text: Delta Air Lines At Los Angeles International Airport
media:content.media:description: A Delta Air Lines Boeing 767 taxis at Los Angeles International Airport after arriving from New York on September 1, 2024 in Los Angeles, California.

item.title: Firework strikes Delta flight landing at Chicago’s Midway Airport

item.description: President Trump highlighted the potential approval of the SAVE America Act during his Salute to America 250 speech, stating his goal to require photo identification to vote and limit the use of mail-in ballots.

media:content.media:title: Trump touts SAVE America Act during Salute to America 250 speech
media:content.media:description: President Trump highlighted the potential approval of the SAVE America Act during his Salute to America 250 speech, stating his goal to require photo identification to vote and limit the use of mail-in ballots.

item.title: Trump touts SAVE America Act during Salute to America 250 speech

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: The best 4th of July sales are happening now. Our editors found worthwhile deals on Apple, Yeti, Medicube and more.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

item.title: The best Fourth of July sales to shop right now

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Kayla Hayempour
Mark Hodge
Jeremy Mikula
item.description: President Donald Trump on Saturday night delivered an address for America’s 250th birthday on a day roiled by severe weather — from triple-digit temperatures to pouring rain.

media:content.media:text: US-POLITICS-ANNIVERSARY-250
media:content.media:description: An attendee holds up an American flag as he waits for US President Donald Trump to speak during the "Salute to America" Independence Day celebration on the National Mall in Washington, DC, on July 4, 2026. The nation is marking the 250th anniversary of the United States Declaration of Indpendence.

media:content.media:text: Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.
media:content.media:description: Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.

media:content.media:text: Serena Williams.
media:content.media:description: Serena Williams plays last week at Wimbledon in London.

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The administration has faced scrutiny for awarding a multimillion-dollar, no-bid contract to a company that previously worked on Trump properties.

media:content.media:text: A U.S. National Park Service employee uses a vacuum pump to clean algae off the bottom of the newly repainted Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
media:content.media:description: Pieces of the blue paint have come loose since work on the pool concluded, and algae bloomed in the water, giving it a bright green shade.

media:content.media:text: Chipped paint and algae are visible in the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on June 21, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Pieces of the blue paint have come loose since work on the pool concluded, and algae bloomed in the water, giving it a bright green shade.

item.title: Interior secretary says administration will use the same company to repair Reflecting Pool

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Fourth of July celebrations across the country were marred by violence that killed at least five people and injured scores in multiple cities.

media:content.media:text: Two NYPD cars drive on the street at night
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

media:content.media:text: 8 wounded in mass shooting on July 4th holiday in New York's Coney Island
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A car is seen on fire while parked on the street
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

item.title: At least five killed in shootings and explosions that leave dozens wounded across the U.S.

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: The state senator’s decision sets up a two-person primary between former public health official Abdul El-Sayed and Rep. Haley Stevens.

media:content.media:text: Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.
media:content.media:description: Democratic state Sen. Mallory McMorrow suspended her campaign for the Senate ahead of the Aug. 4 primary.

item.title: Mallory McMorrow ends bid for Democratic Senate nomination in Michigan
